scripts.build:wp: npm run build && mkdir -p "wordpress-plugin/pixact-cost-calculator/assets/calculator/assets" && cp "dist/manifest.json" "wordpress-plugin/pixact-cost-calculator/assets/calculator/manifest.json" && cp "dist/assets/index.js" "wordpress-plugin/pixact-cost-calculator/assets/calculator/assets/index.js" && cp "dist/assets/index.css" "wordpress-plugin/pixact-cost-calculator/assets/calculator/assets/index.css" && cp "dist/assets/LeadCaptureForm.js" "wordpress-plugin/pixact-cost-calculator/assets/calculator/assets/LeadCaptureForm.js"
scripts.package:wp: npm run build:wp && rm -f "pixact-cost-calculator.zip" && cd "wordpress-plugin" && zip -r "../pixact-cost-calculator.zip" "pixact-cost-calculator"
